title: Timor Sea Treaty - Joint Petroleum Development Area instructions 2015–16 for myTax
description: How to report in myTax income earned from work or services in the Joint Petroleum Development Area.
keywords: Timor Sea Treaty, Joint Petroleum Development Area instruction, Joint Petroleum

content_blocks.text: Use these instructions if you have earned income for performing work or services in the Joint Petroleum Development Area (JPDA) as defined in the Timor Sea Treaty (the treaty) and you are using myTax .

content_text:
## Who should use these instructions?
Use these instructions if you have earned income for performing work or services in the Joint Petroleum Development Area (JPDA) as defined in the Timor Sea Treaty (the treaty) and you are using myTax .
